GlobalLimitExec: skip=0, fetch=10
  GpuCoalescePartitionsExec
    GpuScanExec: batch_size=8012998
--- memory ---
total_cost=1340
GlobalLimitExec: row_width=268, subtree_max_row_bytes=268, input_bytes=268, output_bytes=268, cost=536
  GpuCoalescePartitionsExec: row_width=268, subtree_max_row_bytes=268, input_bytes=268, output_bytes=268, cost=536
    GpuScanExec: row_width=268, subtree_max_row_bytes=268, input_bytes=0, output_bytes=268, cost=268
